blocker: Cannot run pg_dump from this environment because DATABASE_URL is not available to the shell/.env and pg_dump is not installed locally.
rollbackNotes: Create a database backup/export before deploy or runtime jobs.
Prefer Render provider-native Recovery/Export if the database service becomes visible.
Otherwise run pg_dump using DATABASE_URL from an environment variable without printing the URL.
Do not delete old Stripe products/prices or old license rows during rollback.
nextRecommendedStep: Install or use PostgreSQL client tools in a secure environment with DATABASE_URL set privately, then create artifacts/backup-rollback-v1.0.127/fima-db-backup-before-v1.0.127.sql or .sql.gz before deploy/runtime jobs.
